items.hook: Italian War of 1542–46: The first Siege of Boulogne begins.
items.body: The Italian War of 1542–1546 was a conflict late in the Italian Wars, pitting Francis I of France and Suleiman I of the Ottoman Empire against the Holy Roman Emperor Charles V and Henry VIII of England. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: The Final Circle of Paradise is a science fiction novel by Arkady and Boris Strugatsky.
items.body: It was first published in the Soviet Union in 1965, and the first English edition, translated by Leonid Renen, was published by DAW books in 1976. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: World War II: Battle of Cape Spada: The Royal Navy and the Regia Marina clash; the Italian light cruiser Bartolomeo Colleoni sinks, with 121 casualties.
items.body: World War II, or the Second World War, was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies and the Axis powers. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: Bardanes Tourkos is proclaimed emperor by rebellious Byzantine troops.
items.body: Bardanes, nicknamed Tourkos, "the Turk", was a Byzantine general who launched an unsuccessful rebellion against Emperor Nikephoros I in 803. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Bruno Mars has an unexpected opening before Wembley party starts
items.body: After an eight-year absence from UK stages, Bruno Mars returned to Wembley Stadium with a polished, hit-filled show.

items.hook: Maisamma IPS is a 2007 Indian Telugu-language film starring Mumaith Khan and Sayaji Shinde in lead roles.
items.body: This film is about a strict police-woman, who is a people's defender, since the law is unable to do justice to them. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: Austenland is an American musical based on the 2007 novel of the same name, with book by Jodi Picoult and Timothy Allen McDonald and music and lyrics by Kate Anderson and Elyssa Samsel.
items.body: Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: Franco-Prussian War: France declares war on Prussia.
items.body: The Franco-Prussian War, occasionally known as the Franco-German War, and sometimes referred to in France as the War of 1870, was a conflict between France and the North German Confederation led by Prussia. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Lidiya Nikolaevna Seifullina was a Soviet journalist, playwright, novelist, and short story writer.
items.body: Her short story "Virineia" serves as the basis for an opera by Sergei Slonimsky. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Anglo-Spanish War: Battle of Gravelines: The Spanish Armada is sighted in the English Channel.
items.body: The Anglo-Spanish War (1585–1604) was an intermittent conflict between Habsburg Spain and the Kingdom of England that was never formally declared. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Why a Ukrainian cruise missile is flying with hobby drone hardware
items.body: An open-source flight-control system found in consumer drones has been installed in Ukraine’s latest cruise missile, showing how cheap technology is making military hardware accessible to all

items.hook: East German jokes, jibes popular in the former German Democratic Republic, reflected the concerns of East German citizens and residents between 1949 and 1990.
items.body: Jokes frequently targeted political figures, such as Socialist Party General Secretary Erich Honecker or State Security Minister Erich Mielke, who headed the Stasi secret police. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.
